title: Add status projection board
goal: Add a read-only JSON projection that combines registry state, runtime state, workspace state, external evidence, receipts and stale overlays into one status surface.

acceptance.assertion: A command exposes per-task status with registry state, effective state, active run, worker, workspace, external evidence and receipt status.
Unknown, blocked and stale conditions remain visible instead of being collapsed into success or failure.
Projection output is stable JSON suitable for dashboards and later automation.
